title: xerosphaera fragifera
intro:
Xerosphaera fragifera is a type of plant species, however I could not verify the specific type of plant, it is possible that the plant does not exist.

However, If you are referring to the Xerosphaera, it is a genus of succulent plants within the family Aizoaceae. 

In this case, Xerosphaera fragifera is a succulent plant that has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties.
